'''pathutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zektzerite|zektzerite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zektzerite|zektzerite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pathutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthitith|pæthitith]] || [[word:pæthitij|pæthitij]] || [[word:pæthitish|pæthitish]] || [[word:pæthiti|pæthiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathuthututh|pathuthututh]] || [[word:pathuthutuj|pathuthutuj]] || [[word:pathuthutush|pathuthutush]] || [[word:pathuthutu|pathuthutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathututh|pathututh]] || [[word:pathutuj|pathutuj]] || [[word:pathutush|pathutush]] || [[word:pathutu|pathutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathuftufth|pathuftufth]] || [[word:pathuftufj|pathuftufj]] || [[word:pathuftufsh|pathuftufsh]] || [[word:pathuftuf|pathuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathututhu|pathututhu]] || [[word:pathutuju|pathutuju]] || [[word:pathutushu|pathutushu]] || [[word:pathutuku|pathutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathututh|pathututh]] || [[word:pathutuj|pathutuj]] || [[word:pathutush|pathutush]] || [[word:pathutu|pathutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathututhul|pathututhul]] || [[word:pathutujul|pathutujul]] || [[word:pathutushul|pathutushul]] || [[word:pathutukul|pathutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathutuuthuthu|pathutuuthuthu]] || [[word:pathutuujuju|pathutuujuju]] || [[word:pathutuushushu|pathutuushushu]] || [[word:pathutuuku|pathutuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathututhun|pathututhun]] || [[word:pathutujun|pathutujun]] || [[word:pathutushun|pathutushun]] || [[word:pathutukun|pathutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathututhuoro|pathututhuoro]] || [[word:pathutujuoro|pathutujuoro]] || [[word:pathutushuoro|pathutushuoro]] || [[word:pathutukuoro|pathutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
